folders.description:
# Assets

This directory contains static assets like images, fonts, and icons.

# Components

This directory contains reusable React components.

## Purpose
- Shared UI components
- Layout components
- Feature-specific components
- Component utilities

# Screens

This directory contains individual screens for the app.

## Purpose
- Organize app views/pages
- Group screens by feature when needed

# Navigation

This directory contains navigation-related files, such as stack navigators and tab navigators.

# Hooks

This directory contains custom React hooks to reuse logic across the app.

# Context

This directory contains Context API providers and hooks for global state management.

# Redux

This directory contains Redux store configuration, slices, and actions.

## Structure
- `slices/` - Redux slices
- `store.ts` - Store setup

# Services

This directory contains API service files and other app-specific utilities.

## Purpose
- API calls (e.g., Axios fetchers)
- AsyncStorage interactions
- Authentication handling

# Utils

This directory contains helper functions and utility files used across the app.

# Constants

This directory contains global constants like color themes, fonts, and app configurations.

# Styles

This directory contains global styles and theme definitions.
